_note: Reach — CHOR-42 (v0.26): Boss encounter cheat sheet catalog. Entries are hand-authored in-house; damage-type mixes and one-shot bullets paraphrased from public wiki summaries (poewiki.net + poe2db.tw), never copied verbatim. Overcap thresholds are broad guidelines — build-specific tuning is on the user. Extend this file to add new bosses; the C# loader is tolerant of missing optional fields.

entries.label: The Arbiter of Ash
oneShots: Volcanic Slam — sidestep the red cone before it lands
Meteor call — do not stand under the shadow marker
Phase 2 arena ignite — walk clockwise around the burning ring
entries.flaskNotes: Prioritize fire-resist flask uptime; ignite pulses in phase 2 will chunk uncapped builds.

phases.note: Arena floor ignites in rotating rings — keep moving

entries.label: Xesht, We That Are One (Breachlord)
oneShots: Hand-of-Xesht ground slam — do not stand between the fingers
Chaos rift pulses — leave the marked circle before it detonates
Grab attack telegraph — dash out before the arm closes
entries.flaskNotes: Chaos resist matters — Xesht deals more chaos than most atlas bosses. Bring at least one chaos-flask or chaos-res on gear.

phases.note: Summons Hands — kill the leftmost first to unlock the boss's ground slam pattern
Breach walls close in — arena shrinks; movement skill up

entries.label: Kosis, the Revelation (Delirium)
oneShots: Freezing pulse cone — do not stand in the frost trail
Mirror-image summons — kill the correct copy (unshielded one) or take a chaos backfire
Sanity-drain aura — stack away when the screen desaturates
entries.flaskNotes: Freeze immunity is worth slotting. Cold-resist over-cap is the difference between a chip and a chunk.

phases.note: Mirror-images spawn each 10 s — focus real one (no gold shimmer)
Sanity-drain aura permanent — keep chaos-recovery uptime

entries.label: The Maven (Pinnacle Cast)
oneShots: Memory-game phase — repeat the flashed pattern or take a phase-transition hit
Ball-lightning line — leap sideways before the ring closes
Meteor circle summon — the safe zone is the smallest circle
entries.flaskNotes: Balanced-elemental profile — over-cap all three elements. Movement flask crucial for the ball-lightning phase.

phases.note: Memory phase — three flashes; add-summons overlap
Memory phase — five flashes; miss any and lose ~25% HP

entries.label: The Bodach (Pinnacle Cast)
oneShots: Overhead crush — dash out of the ground shadow before it lands
Cold-lightning storm — stand in the safe corridor between arcs
Grab-throw combo — cannot be blocked; movement skill only
entries.flaskNotes: Physical damage reduction (armour or evasion) matters more than element resist here.

phases.note: Berserk — attack speed +30%, ignore usual telegraphs and pre-emptively dash

_attribution: Boss telegraphs cross-checked against public wiki summaries (paraphrased). Damage-type mixes are broad, build-agnostic guidelines.
